rulings.Case Title: GF CONSTRUCTION CO. INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ANTHONY S. KWONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To Amend Their First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANTs ANTHONY KWONG and MANDY KWONG's Motion For Leave To Amend Their First Amended Cross-Complaint: DENIED. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE ROYCE ATONDO ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, L.L.C. ET AL (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANTS SURESH PATEL, NICK PATEL, SAM DEVDHARA, 445 O'FARRELL STREET LLC, and MARIA RIOS' Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Cross-Complaint: GRANTED. Second Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed forthwith. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERESA BICKERS ET AL VS. PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANTS PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, PARKMERCED OWNER LLC, and SUTRO MANAGEMENT GROUP LTD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege damages caused by breach of warranty of habitability and to allege facts re: delivery of possession. (See Opposition 5:1-6). (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JOAQUIN SHAW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From Forfeiture;Memorandum Of Points And Authroities; Declaration In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT JOAQUIN SHAW's Motion For Relief From Forfeiture: Continued to April 8, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501 per March 23, 2016 ex-parte order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RENE FORONDA VS. ROBLEY EVANS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID MARTINEZ' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on breach of the "no assignment" provision and is not uncertain. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARTURO VEGA FERNANDEZ VS. EDILBERTO MEJIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 24, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT EDILBERTO MEJIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED, subject to opposition. (501/REQ)
